caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" written in gold letters on the chest, a gold chain, and a silver watch. He is wearing over-ear headphones and sits behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm positioned in front of him. In the background, a white wall features a repeating logo with five gold stars and the text "UNICORN HUSTLE." Above him, a sign reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'" and another partial sign reads "K 101." On the desk, there is a black container and a smaller white object. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar pose, looking slightly to his left with a subtle smile, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he appears to be speaking or reacting. The scene remains static with no significant movement or change in location.
